claims.summary: Dynamic exploration noise pressure room may need a gentler gradient around density 0.12-0.18.
claims.rationale: Changing DYNAMIC_NOISE_PRESSURE_ROOM would alter live ESN exploration/control behavior and needs Tier 5 approval plus replay evidence.

claims.summary: Pressure risk vs density-gradient drift should be monitored for waxy friction turning into viscous drag.
claims.rationale: Existing regulator, pressure texture, viscosity, SHADOW_TRAJECTORY, and receptivity-buffer surfaces expose pressure_risk, density/viscosity/distinguishability, and read-only routes for observing the condition.

claims.summary: Adaptive leak scaling with distinguishability_loss above roughly 35% is a serious but live-control proposal.
claims.rationale: ESN leak/rho changes affect live substrate dynamics and must remain approval-gated before implementation.
